Executing (default): INSERT INTO `composers` (`id`,`name`,`createdAt`,`updatedAt`) VALUES (NULL,$1,$2,$3);
Executing (default): INSERT INTO `pieces` (`id`,`title`,`createdAt`,`updatedAt`,`composerId`) VALUES (NULL,$1,$2,$3,$4);
Executing (default): INSERT INTO `pieces` (`id`,`title`,`lyrics`,`createdAt`,`updatedAt`,`composerId`) VALUES (NULL,$1,$2,$3,$4,$5);
Executing (default): INSERT INTO `pieces` (`id`,`title`,`origin`,`createdAt`,`updatedAt`) VALUES (NULL,$1,$2,$3,$4);
Executing (default): INSERT INTO `collections` (`id`,`title`,`prefix`,`singleEdition`,`createdAt`,`updatedAt`) VALUES (NULL,$1,$2,$3,$4,$5);
Executing (default): INSERT INTO `events` (`id`,`date`,`type`,`notes`,`finalized`,`version`,`createdAt`,`updatedAt`,`choirId`) VALUES (NULL,$1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8);
Executing (default): SELECT `piece`.*, `composer`.`id` AS `composer.id`, `composer`.`name` AS `composer.name`, `collections`.`id` AS `collections.id`, `collections`.`prefix` AS `collections.prefix`, `collections`.`singleEdition` AS `collections.singleEdition`, `collections`.`title` AS `collections.title`, `collections->collection_piece`.`id` AS `collections.collection_piece.id`, `collections->collection_piece`.`numberInCollection` AS `collections.collection_piece.numberInCollection` FROM (SELECT `piece`.`id`, `piece`.`title`, `piece`.`subtitle`, `piece`.`composerCollection`, `piece`.`voicing`, `piece`.`key`, `piece`.`timeSignature`, `piece`.`durationSec`, `piece`.`lyrics`, `piece`.`imageIdentifier`, `piece`.`license`, `piece`.`opus`, `piece`.`lyricsSource`, `piece`.`origin`, `piece`.`shareToken`, `piece`.`createdAt`, `piece`.`updatedAt`, `piece`.`userId`, `piece`.`creatorId`, `piece`.`composerId`, `piece`.`categoryId`, `piece`.`authorId` FROM `pieces` AS `piece` WHERE (`piece`.`title` LIKE '%hope%' OR `piece`.`lyrics` LIKE '%hope%' OR `piece`.`origin` LIKE '%hope%') LIMIT 10) AS `piece` LEFT OUTER JOIN `composers` AS `composer` ON `piece`.`composerId` = `composer`.`id` LEFT OUTER JOIN ( `collection_pieces` AS `collections->collection_piece` INNER JOIN `collections` AS `collections` ON `collections`.`id` = `collections->collection_piece`.`collectionId`) ON `piece`.`id` = `collections->collection_piece`.`pieceId`;
Executing (default): SELECT `pieceId`, `rating` FROM `choir_repertoires` AS `choir_repertoire` WHERE `choir_repertoire`.`choirId` = 1 AND `choir_repertoire`.`pieceId` IN (2);
Executing (default): SELECT `id`, `date`, `type`, `notes`, `organistId`, `finalized`, `version`, `monthlyPlanId`, `program_id` AS `programId`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, `choirId`, `userId`, `directorId` FROM `events` AS `event` WHERE (`event`.`notes` LIKE '%hope%' OR CAST(`type` AS TEXT) LIKE '%hope%') AND `event`.`choirId` = 1 ORDER BY `event`.`date` DESC LIMIT 10;
Executing (default): SELECT `id`, `title`, `subtitle`, `publisher`, `prefix`, `description`, `publisherNumber`, `singleEdition`, `coverImage`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, `publisherId` FROM `collections` AS `collection` WHERE (`collection`.`title` LIKE '%hope%' OR `collection`.`subtitle` LIKE '%hope%' OR `collection`.`prefix` LIKE '%hope%') LIMIT 10;
Executing (default): SELECT `piece`.*, `composer`.`id` AS `composer.id`, `composer`.`name` AS `composer.name`, `collections`.`id` AS `collections.id`, `collections`.`prefix` AS `collections.prefix`, `collections`.`singleEdition` AS `collections.singleEdition`, `collections`.`title` AS `collections.title`, `collections->collection_piece`.`id` AS `collections.collection_piece.id`, `collections->collection_piece`.`numberInCollection` AS `collections.collection_piece.numberInCollection` FROM (SELECT `piece`.`id`, `piece`.`title`, `piece`.`subtitle`, `piece`.`composerCollection`, `piece`.`voicing`, `piece`.`key`, `piece`.`timeSignature`, `piece`.`durationSec`, `piece`.`lyrics`, `piece`.`imageIdentifier`, `piece`.`license`, `piece`.`opus`, `piece`.`lyricsSource`, `piece`.`origin`, `piece`.`shareToken`, `piece`.`createdAt`, `piece`.`updatedAt`, `piece`.`userId`, `piece`.`creatorId`, `piece`.`composerId`, `piece`.`categoryId`, `piece`.`authorId` FROM `pieces` AS `piece` WHERE (`piece`.`title` LIKE '%Trad%' OR `piece`.`lyrics` LIKE '%Trad%' OR `piece`.`origin` LIKE '%Trad%') LIMIT 10) AS `piece` LEFT OUTER JOIN `composers` AS `composer` ON `piece`.`composerId` = `composer`.`id` LEFT OUTER JOIN ( `collection_pieces` AS `collections->collection_piece` INNER JOIN `collections` AS `collections` ON `collections`.`id` = `collections->collection_piece`.`collectionId`) ON `piece`.`id` = `collections->collection_piece`.`pieceId`;
